description:
The GradiantImage component takes in a SpriteProvider or Material and controls the image color using the four corners of the image, then gradients them into the image.

}}

fields.Sprite: The sprite to use as the image.
fields.Material: The Material to use as the image.
fields.PreserveAspect: Preserves the aspect ratio of this image provided.
fields.NineSliceSizing: Tells how the image gets 9-sliced on this UIX.
fields.FlipHorizontally: Flips the image horizontally (but not the color).
fields.FlipVertically: Flips the image vertically (but not the color).
fields.InteractionTarget: Makes this image as the interaction target for this UIX.
fields.FillRect: The filling rect for this image.
fields.__legacyZWrite: The legacy Z writing for this image.
fields.TintTopLeft: The color of this top left corner.
fields.TintTopRight: The color of this top right corner.
fields.TintBottomRight: The color of this bottom right corner.
fields.TintBottomLeft: The color of this bottom left corner.

usage: You can make fancy effects and icons using this component, especially if your hue shifting the different color corners.
